_comment: User-scope MCP servers to register at install time. Populate from your own machine with (PowerShell): node tools\export-mcp-template.js "$env:USERPROFILE\.claude.json" mcp-servers.template.json  --  the cmd-style %USERPROFILE% form expands only in cmd.exe, and quoting matters because the profile path can contain spaces (secrets are redacted to <<SET-ME>>, home paths tokenized to <<HOME>>). Ships empty in the public kit.
